finding: `npm run validate:skill-templates` fails in a clean worktree because `scripts/validate-skill-templates.ts` requires `atm-memory-consolidate`, but `templates/skills/atm-memory-consolidate.skill.md` is not present in the tracked template set.
expectedBehavior: The skill-template validator should either ship every required template it enforces or remove stale requiredTemplateIds so unrelated governance work can use the validator as a clean regression gate.
evidenceOrRepro: During ATM-BUG-2026-07-15-192 validation on branch codex/bug-192, `npm run validate:skill-templates` failed with `[skill-templates:validate] missing skill template: atm-memory-consolidate` and `minimum ATM skill template count mismatch` after a node_modules junction provided the required dependencies.
followUp: Open a focused template-inventory task to decide whether atm-memory-consolidate is an official ATM skill; then either add the tracked template and adapter projections or remove it from requiredTemplateIds with regression coverage.
